required_skills: Deep subject-matter expertise in Physics, Chemistry, or Mathematics at JEE Advanced level
Strong command of JEE Main and JEE Advanced exam patterns, marking schemes, and syllabus
Concept-building pedagogy for competitive exam preparation at Class 11–12 level
Problem-solving methodology including shortcut techniques and time-optimized approaches
Doubt resolution and individualized academic mentoring for high-stakes exam aspirants
Classroom instruction and lecture delivery for large and small student cohorts
Performance tracking and student progress analysis against JEE benchmarks
Design and evaluation of JEE-style tests including full-length mock exams and part-tests
preferred_skills: Experience teaching at a reputed coaching institute (FIITJEE, Allen, Resonance, Aakash, Vedantu, Unacademy)
Online live teaching using digital whiteboards and EdTech platforms
Content creation for recorded video lectures and digital study material
Data-driven approach to identifying weak areas from diagnostic tests and tailoring remediation
Mentoring students for rank improvement from JEE Mains to JEE Advanced qualification
Familiarity with rank prediction models and cut-off trends for IIT and NIT admissions
Ability to teach interdisciplinary topics at the intersection of Physics and Mathematics (e.g., calculus in mechanics)
frameworks: JEE Advanced Syllabus Framework (IIT Joint Admission Board)
Bloom's Taxonomy (applied to problem difficulty classification)
responsibilities: Deliver high-quality concept lectures in Physics, Chemistry, or Mathematics aligned with the complete JEE Main and JEE Advanced syllabus
Design and conduct topic-wise tests, chapter tests, and full-length JEE mock exams with detailed performance analytics for each student
Resolve student doubts through structured doubt-clearing sessions, both in-class and via one-on-one academic mentoring
Develop and curate JEE-level problem sets, including Integer Type, MCQ Single Correct, MCQ Multiple Correct, and Paragraph-based question formats
Analyze student performance data from mock tests to identify learning gaps and adapt teaching pace and content accordingly
Create concise, high-yield study notes and formula sheets that help students consolidate key concepts for rapid revision
Conduct motivational and strategy sessions to help students build exam temperament, time management, and stress-coping skills for JEE
Collaborate with content teams to develop recorded video lectures and digital practice modules aligned with the JEE syllabus
Track individual student rank trajectories across mock tests and provide targeted guidance to aspirants aiming for Top 1000 AIR
Stay current with changes in JEE exam pattern, NTA guidelines, and IIT JAB announcements to ensure teaching content remains accurate and up-to-date
